resources.string: 用两个手指点击小部件框架来移动和调整大小。
太棒了！用两个手指点击来隐藏编辑界面。
三指轻点小部件边框即可暂时隐藏它。它会一直隐藏，直到您关闭并重新打开屏幕。

Widgets Anywhere requires an Accessibility Service to display widgets on the lock screen and in the notification center. No data is collected, and no actions will be performed on the device. This permission is optional if you are only using the home screen widget stacks.
Display your home screen widgets in one or more frames above the lock screen.
Display your home screen widgets in a drawer you can access from anywhere with a simple swipe.
Display your home screen widgets in a paged stack in any launcher app.
Display your home screen widgets in a paged stack in any launcher app. Get started by adding the \"Widget Stack\" widget to your home screen.
您确定要删除这个项目吗？
在 Mastodon 上关注我的应用和随机发展相关的神话的最新信息。
如果你实在无聊的话，可以看看我的网站。
如果您有疑问或问题，请给我发一封电子邮件。请尽可能多的详细信息。 只需告诉我“它不起作用”就会浪费每个人的时间。
Widgets Anywhere is open source! If you\'re a developer or tinkerer interested in helping to improve the project (or you just want to check out the source), tap here.
每月1美元您可以访问我所有付费的应用，以及一些独家的东西。

The Accessibility Service isn\'t currently running. This may be because you need to allowlist Widgets Anywhere from your phone\'s battery optimizations, or you may just need to toggle it off and on again in Settings.
Widgets Anywhere doesn\'t collect any data beyond what\'s needed for crash analysis. Learn more below.
Widgets Anywhere doesn\'t collect any data beyond what\'s needed for crash analysis. Tap here to learn more.
显示通知时隐藏小部件框架。 这需要使用通知侦听器服务。您现在不必授予此权限。
当通知阴影下拉时，尝试隐藏小部件框架。这可能无法在所有设备上工作。
当显示PIN/图案/密码输入视图时尝试隐藏部件框架。这可能无法在所有设备上工作。
显示/隐藏小部件帧的动画。
Turn this on to create verbose logs of Widgets Anywhere\'s state.
导出调试日志到一个文件。
显示调试 ID 视图
在当前屏幕上将其检测到的视图ID列表覆盖小部件框架。 用于调试和查找可用来检测不同锁屏状态的 ID。

Sets the delay between Accessibility Events that Widgets Anywhere responds to. Shorter values mean the frame will respond faster to changes, at the potential cost of device performance and battery life.

The widget frame will hide itself when these IDs are not on-screen. You can find which IDs should go here by enabling both Debug switches and looking at the IDs that are highlighted in red when you want the frame to be hidden.

The widget frame will hide itself when these IDs are on-screen. You can find which IDs should go here by enabling both Debug switches and looking at the IDs that are highlighted in green when you want the frame to be hidden.
当通知阴影完全扩展时显示
启用此选项将导致小部件框架在阴影完全扩展时出现。这个状态有自己的独立位置和大小。

If you\'re using the option to show in the notification center, you may not want the widget frame to show on the main lock screen. Disable this option to have the frame only show when the notification center is fully expanded.
更改小部件框架的四角是如何圆形的。
设置部件框架的背景颜色，包括透明度。
蒙板模式试图绘制壁纸作为小部件框架的背景。 在一个兼容的设备上，这将显示透明帧的外观，同时允许您覆盖界面元素。
某些设备使锁屏界面的壁纸轻微变暗。调整以匹配。
覆盖距离传感器时忽略小部件帧触摸。
提示解锁/解除通知中心
If Widgets Anywhere detects that a widget is launching an app, it will prompt to unlock the device and dismiss the notification center. Disable this option to prevent that behavior.
在Facebook小部件上隐藏 (现在屏幕)
当显示Facebook小部件屏幕时隐藏帧。这也被称为“一个 UI 7 及以后的扩展屏幕”。
当设备在横屏时隐藏部件框架。
锁定时单独设置通知中心位置
在一个 UI 3 中，当锁定和解锁时，通知中心布局略有不同。 启用此选项可以在这两种模式中使用小部件框架的单独位置。
启用时，部件框架将忽略所有直接触摸。 您将无法从帧中移动或修改部件， 但三指的隐藏手势仍然可以正常工作，您仍然能够与小部件进行交互。
如果启用，小部件触摸将被忽略。这将防止意外启动应用程序，但也将防止与小部件的交互。
如果启用此项，小部件抽屉将被锁定。 您将无法移除、调整大小或重新排序小部件，但您仍然能够与它们进行交互。
设定淡入/淡出动画完成所需的时间。
备份当前小部件和快捷方式。这不包括小部件倾斜。
从备份中还原小部件和快捷方式。这将替换现有的小部件和快捷方式。这不包括小部件倾斜。
在三星设备和 Android 12 及更高版本上，可以模糊框架的背景。 这将不适用于应用Mask模式的地方，可能无法在所有设备或节电模式下工作。
在三星设备和安卓12及以后的设备上，可以模糊抽屉的背景。 这可能无法在所有设备上或在节电模式下使用。

By default, the widget frame remembers which page it was on the last time it was on-screen and scrolls to that position every time it shows. Disable this option to have the widget frame always show the first page when it appears.
当三星边缘面板打开时隐藏小部件框架。
如果在锁屏界面显示小部件框架，请选择要隐藏哪个应用程序。
在横屏模式下为小部件帧设置不同的位置和大小。

When widgets are shown on the screen, pending widget updates aren\'t always dispatched. To work around this, all widgets are forced to reload by default, which can cause short flashing. Disable this option to avoid flashing, at the potential cost of up-to-date widgets.
当软件键盘在屏幕上显示时，隐藏小部件框架。
双击空格(小部件外面)关闭屏幕。当启用\"忽略小部件触摸\"时，这适用于整个框架。
双击空格(小部件外面)关闭屏幕。
When enabled, the selected frame will ignore all touches, and the whatever is underneath will receive them instead. Frames will always respond to touches in preview mode.
On Android 13 and later, Widgets Anywhere requires the use of a companion app to retrieve the device wallpaper.
Widgets Anywhere is an app focused on making widgets more accessible and providing extra features.
点击“加”页面添加小部件、按住以重新排序/调整大小/删除列表中的小部件。 并用两个手指点击框架上的任何位置移动/调整帧大小或添加一个部件。 您也可以用三指来隐藏小部件帧，直到屏幕关闭并再次开启。
To be able to display on the lock screen, you\'ll need to activate Widgets Anywhere\'s Accessibility Service. This app doesn\'t collect any data from your screen.
Widgets Anywhere can hide the widget frame while there are notifications displayed. To do so, you\'ll need to enable the Notification Listener. You don\'t have to grant this right now.

The widget frame has a \"masking\" mode, where it will use your wallpaper as the background, causing it to seem transparent, while also being able to cover lock screen elements. To do this, Widgets Anywhere needs permission to be able to read your device\'s storage. You don\'t have to grant this right now. If you\'re running Lollipop, this permission is already granted. More details are available in the privacy policy.
On Android 13 and later, Widgets Anywhere requires a companion app to retrieve the wallpaper. You only need to install this if you want to use Masked Mode.

Many devices, including those running MIUI and EMUI, have incredibly aggressive battery management. This can cause Widgets Anywhere to be killed when you don\'t want it to be. Click the button below to read how you can allowlist Widgets Anywhere on your particular device.

Widgets Anywhere supports adding frames to multiple displays, but Motorola blocks secondary display access to third party apps by default on the Razr models. Tap below to open the screen where you can grant permission to Widgets Anywhere to use the cover display. Once there, find Widgets Anywhere in the list, tap it, and enable \"Allow on external display\".
Your firmware implements an autostart permission system, which may prevent Widgets Anywhere from running correctly. Use the button below to allow Widgets Anywhere autostart permissions.
就是这样！请检查您的锁屏界面，您现在应该看到小部件框架！
可以通过三种方式之一来添加一个小部件。 如果小部件分页器没有添加任何小部件，请单击其中出现的\"加\"按钮。 否则，您可以用两个手指点击帧，然后点击框架右上方的“加”按钮。 您也可以通过点击主屏幕右上角的“附加”按钮从应用本身添加一个小部件。
如果框架正在进行，或者你想要它是不同的大小，你可以轻松地移动和调整它的大小。 只需用两个手指点击帧本身即可显示编辑界面。
如果你只需要隐藏小部件框架一段时间，用三个手指点击它。 您也可以通过双指点击进入编辑界面，然后按左上方的眼睛按钮。 这将隐藏帧直到屏幕关闭并再次开启。
要更改小部件的顺序，只需长按你想移动的小部件并将其拖到你想要的位置。
要移除小部件，请长按它而不拖动并点击右上角出现的红色按钮。 长按小部件还会在边缘周围显示四个“拖动器”，你可以用来调整小部件。

All phones are different, and it\'s possible that the built-in hiding options don\'t work on your device. Or maybe you want to implement a hiding behavior of your own. This can be implemented with the \"Hide on Present IDs\" and \"Hide on Non-Present IDs\" options. Any IDs you add to the former will cause the widget frame to hide when it detects any of those IDs on-screen. Any IDs you add to the latter will cause the widget frame to hide when Widgets Anywhere does not detect any of those IDs on-screen. You can find out which IDs should be added by enabling both Debug options and seeing which IDs are highlighted in green or red.

On Samsung One UI devices, you can run a limited subset of widgets using your QS tiles. Add the Widgets Anywhere tiles to your quick settings, and tap the text of the tile to get started. Widgets that involve dynamic lists, like email or calendar widgets, likely won\'t work. This isn\'t something that can be fixed.
由于缺少权限，无法配置小部件 %s 。请联系应用开发者或设备制造商。
由于缺少权限，无法绑定小部件 %s 。请联系应用开发者或设备制造商。
请启用调试日志选项以在这里查看 ID。
触摸保护活动。请发现距离感应器。
辅助功能服务尚未启动。请稍候。
点击空空间关闭抽屉栏
启用此选项后，在窗口小部件区域外点击将导致抽屉关闭。
添加一个句柄到屏幕的侧面，可以滑动打开抽屉。
设置抽屉句句柄应该是多少。
设定抽屉句柄的宽度。这可能有助于显示曲线边缘。
选择抽屉布局应该有多少列。
设置屏幕两侧和外部部件边缘之间应显示多少空间。
当通知面板打开时隐藏
当通知面板扩展后取消小部件抽屉。
单点触手动打开抽屉栏
单击手柄将立即打开抽屉，而不是需要拖动或双次点击。
阻止抽屉里的句柄被移动。
在状态栏区域上显示模糊效果。
在状态栏上显示背景颜色
在状态栏顶部显示抽屉背景颜色。 如果您有不透明的背景颜色，您可以考虑关闭此颜色。
仅在设备在锁屏界面上显示抽屉。
Widgets Anywhere uses Bugsnag to collect anonymous crash reports. Not that to fully disable collection, you\'ll have to force stop and reopen Widgets Anywhere.
为快捷图标选择一个图标包。这适用于框架和抽屉。
您确定要重置位置和大小吗？

When enabled, Widgets Anywhere will use Android\'s API to check whether a widget tap is launching an Activity. This can be faster than Widgets Anywhere\'s built-in detection, but may cause false positives.
Help translate Widgets Anywhere into your language.
看起来您正在使用一个限制ADB授予权限能力的设备。 允许的设置应该在开发者选项中，并被调用类似于\"禁用权限监测\"的东西， \"USB 调试(安全设置)\"，或\"禁用权限监视器\"。 一旦您切换了该选项，请回到这里再试一次。
在可折叠设备上，默认显示通常在内部和外部显示之间切换，取决于设备是打开还是关闭。 翻转设备时，它通常总是内部显示。
Tap \"Add Widget\" to add a widget to the stack.
用来保持小部件堆栈中最新的部件。
Display home screen widgets in the expanded view of quick settings tiles in the notification center. Get started by adding a \"Widgets Anywhere\" QS tile.
